name: wangkf--epub-eink-optimizer
description: This skill should be used when the user wants to optimize an epub file for e-ink readers (墨水屏电子书). It handles image deduplication, removal of tiny decorative images, resizing oversized images, and JPEG recompression — all targeting reduced file size while preserving readability on e-ink devices. Trigger phrases include: epub优化、墨水屏、电子书瘦身、epub压缩、 epub图片处理、epub减小体积、epub图片优化、epub图片去重、清理epub图片、缩小epub、 optimize epub, epub for kindle/kobo/boox.
